series_metadata.series_description: This record documents adjustments made to invoices from Medicaid providers for services rendered. Files contain adjustment request forms (ODJFS 6766 and 6767) and related correspondence detailing payment discrepancies or erroneous payments to providers. This documentation may be used by other ODJFS sections, the Attorney General’s office, or federal auditors to determine the correctness of payments, compliance to policy requirements, federal financial participation, and as supporting information in fraud investigations.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 90 days after hard copy is imaged and then destroy provided all pending audit findings/lawsuits have been released and resolved. ; Microform: Retain 90 days after hard copy is imaged and then destroy provided all pending audit findings/lawsuits have been released and resolved. ; Electronic: Retain 90 days after hard copy is imaged and then destroy provided all pending audit findings/lawsuits have been released and resolved., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
